{{Infobox location
| name = Capital (The Elder Empire: Sea)
| introduced = Of Sea and Shadow
}}

''See also: [[Capital (The Elder Empire: Sea) Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The Capital is a massive, sprawling city that serves as the central seat of the [[Elder Empire]]. It is so expansive that it covers much of the coastline, appearing to swallow the land as it stretches north and south. The city is characterized by a constant atmosphere of smoke and the chaotic, continuous ringing of thousands of bells. Within its borders lies the [[Imperial Palace]], a structure so large it is considered a city in its own right and houses tens of thousands of inhabitants. The Capital also contains the [[Navigator chapter house]], a large building constructed from the remains of old ships, featuring masts and porthole windows. Historically, the area has functioned as a hub for culture, a refuge for displaced people, and a location for various businesses. The city is also home to the highest density of Emperor-designed statues used in the [[Optasia]] system, with several located just outside its limits. As a central political hub, it contains the throne that represents the entire [[Empire]].}}

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The Capital is a city of gleaming clock-towers and ancient spires that remains unconquered by the night. Within its borders lie various [[Imperial]] homes and wealthy districts, all sustained by resources from the [[Imperial Palace]] to fund the [[Imperial Guard]]. Although it was once identified in a burned message, the city fell into several months of chaos following the death of [[Emperor (Elder Empire)|the Emperor]].}}

<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">6</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The Capital is a location mentioned in the burned message.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c1">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 1</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The Capital is a city that night cannot conquer.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c2">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 2</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The [[Imperial Palace]]'s resources were used for keeping the Capital running and funding the [[Imperial Guard]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c3">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 3</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The Capital contains wealthy districts and [[Imperial]] homes.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c4">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 4</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The Capital was swallowed in chaos for a few months after [[Emperor (Elder Empire)|the Emperor]]'s death.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c7">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The Capital contains ancient spires and gleaming clock-towers.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c28">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 28</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|The Capital is a vast city that swallows the coastline and can be approached by sea. Mentioned as a destination by [[Andel]], it is also the location [[Bliss]] intends to return to. This city houses [[Kanatalia]] workshops and an upper crust of influential people, while its population has been acclimated to the concept of a leader for many years. Within its borders, prisoners face trial, and it serves as the intended destination for the escort of the [[Consultants]].}}

<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">9</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|The Capital is a destination mentioned by [[Andel]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c2">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 2</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|The Capital is a location [[Bliss]] intends to return to.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c4">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 4</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|The Capital is a location that can be approached by sea.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c6">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|The population of the Capital has been acclimated to the idea of a leader for years.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c8">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 8</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|The Capital is a location where prisoners face trial.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c9">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|The Capital is a location with an upper crust of influential people.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c14">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|The Capital is a location containing [[Kanatalia]] workshops.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c17">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 17</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|The [[Consultants]] were to be escorted back to the Capital.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c24">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 24</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|The Capital is a vast city that swallows the coastline.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c24" />}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Of Kings and Killers ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|During a period of surging population for the coronation, the Capital serves as the home of a [[Navigator chapter house]] and an [[Imperial Palace]] that occupies nearly twenty percent of the city. Though its military harbor is small compared to [[Candle Bay]], the location is visible through a rift in the [[void]] and features streets lit by sunset-orange quicklamps at night. Chaos eventually erupts throughout the city as champions are found dead and citizens scream that the [[Imperial Palace]] has fallen. Amidst this turmoil, [[Calder]] flies back through the Capital, a location filled with wards against the [[Elders]] and [[Optasia]] statues that can be protected by the [[White Sun]].}}

<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">21</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The Capital's population surged for the coronation.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c2">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 2</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The Capital's military harbor is tiny compared to [[Candle Bay]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c4">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 4</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The characters are sticking around the Capital.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c4" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The Capital contains a [[Navigator chapter house]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c5">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 5</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The [[Imperial Palace]] takes up almost twenty percent of the Capital.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c6">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The Capital is a location from which [[Captain Tommison]] sailed.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c8">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 8</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The Capital contains the [[Imperial Palace]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c11">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 11</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The Capital is visible through a rift in the [[void]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c11" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The Capital contains a bell tower rooftop.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c13">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 13</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Bliss]] attempted to transport herself directly to the Capital.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c13" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The Capital is where the gathered citizens are located.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c15">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 15</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Champions]] were being found dead all over the Capital.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c17">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 17</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The Capital is buzzing and people are screaming that the [[Imperial Palace]] has fallen.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c17" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The streets of the Capital are lit by sunset-orange quicklamps at night.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c17" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The Capital features a well-furnished living room style.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c18">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 18</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Calder]] sat on a throne in the center of the Capital in the vision.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c19">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The Capital is in a state of chaos.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c20">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 20</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The Capital contains a high concentration of [[Optasia]] statues.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c20" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The Capital is a location that can be protected by the [[White Sun]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c21">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 21</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The Capital is filled with wards against the [[Elders]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c21" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Calder]] flew back through the Capital.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c21" />}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|"I just learned how to do this, and it’s going to blow the pants off certain people back in the Capital."<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c1" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Of Sea and Shadow]]
[[Category:Of Dawn and Darkness]]
[[Category:Of Kings and Killers]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire locations]]
[[Category:Settlements]]
